holdings.infoBox: BMED is an equity ETF with a total of 61 individual holdings. The top holdings are Merck & Co. stock at 5.71%, Gilead Sciences at 5.11%, Johnson & Johnson at 5.10%, BLK CSH FND TREASURY SL AGENCY at 4.98%, and Edwards Lifesciences at 4.85%.

overview.description: The iShares Health Innovation Active ETF (BMED) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund is actively managed to invest in global equities in the health sciences industry. BMED was launched on Sep 29, 2020 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: BlackRock strategist explains ‘2 compelling reasons to own health care' stocks in 2023
data.text: BlackRock U.S. Head of Thematic and Active Equity ETFs Jay Jacobs joins Yahoo Finance Live to discuss fiscal spending in 2023, clean energy, ETFs, health care stocks, investor sentiment, layoffs acros...
